mandarin-oriental-beijing.description: In the heart of Beijing, Mandarin Oriental Wangfujing, Beijing is a refined sanctuary with panoramic Forbidden City views, an urban luxury haven.
mandarin-oriental-beijing.descriptionZh: 北京王府井文华东方酒店位于北京核心地带，装修精致奢华，坐拥恢宏的故宫全景。

mandarin-oriental-shanghai.description: Located on the banks of the Huangpu River, Mandarin Oriental Pudong, Shanghai offers the perfect combination of style, comfort and world-class service.
mandarin-oriental-shanghai.descriptionZh: 上海浦东文华东方酒店坐落于黄浦江畔，将时尚风范、舒适和贴心服务集于一身。

mandarin-oriental-guangzhou.description: Located in Tianhe, Mandarin Oriental, Guangzhou epitomises contemporary elegance. Offer award-winning dining and spa with exceptional service.
mandarin-oriental-guangzhou.descriptionZh: 广州文华东方酒店坐落于天河区，呈现典雅奢华的现代风格。拥有屡获殊荣的餐饮场所和水疗中心，并提供热情周到的服务。

mandarin-oriental-shenzhen.description: Nestled above the city, Mandarin Oriental, Shenzhen offers sophisticated rooms, exceptional dining, and unparalleled well-being with breathtaking panoramic views.
mandarin-oriental-shenzhen.descriptionZh: 深圳文华东方酒店高踞于城市上空，为宾客提供高雅精致的客房、非凡的餐饮体验以及上佳的健康体验，同时尽享令人惊叹的全景视野。

mandarin-oriental-hong-kong.description: Located in the beating heart of Central, Mandarin Oriental, Hong Kong is the epitome of contemporary luxury combined with Oriental heritage.
mandarin-oriental-hong-kong.descriptionZh: 香港文华东方酒店坐落于香港中环中心地带，是现代奢华与东方传统融合的典范。

mandarin-oriental-macau.description: At the heart of the prestigious Macau waterfront with stunning views towards Nam Van Lake, the Macau Tower and South China Sea.
mandarin-oriental-macau.descriptionZh: 酒店位于澳门海滨中心，坐拥南湾湖、澳门塔和南海的壮丽景致。

mandarin-oriental-tokyo.description: Mandarin Oriental, Tokyo, renowned for its sophisticated luxury and award-winning service, is located in the prestigious Nihonbashi district. A true culinary destination, it features a selection of world-class dining experiences set against stunning views of the city skyline and Mount Fuji.
mandarin-oriental-tokyo.descriptionZh: 东京文华东方酒店坐落于知名的日本桥区，以其精致奢华和屡获殊荣的服务而享有盛名。这是真正的美食目的地，提供优质的餐饮美食体验，同时可欣赏城市天际线和富士山的壮丽景色。

mandarin-oriental-singapore.description: Welcome to Exceptionally Singapore. The reimagined Mandarin Oriental, Singapore is a sanctuary of luxury and sophistication overlooking the iconic Marina Bay.
mandarin-oriental-singapore.descriptionZh: 欢迎来到非凡新加坡。新加坡文华东方酒店以焕然一新的面貌展现奢华典雅风范，是俯瞰滨海湾标志性美景的理想胜地。

mandarin-oriental-bangkok.description: For over 150 years, travellers have journeyed along the Chao Phraya River to stay at the legendary Mandarin Oriental, Bangkok.
mandarin-oriental-bangkok.descriptionZh: 传奇曼谷文华东方酒店坐落于湄南河畔，开门营业已有逾150年的历史。

mandarin-oriental-london.description: Where two wonderful worlds converge. An iconic landmark that sits both on Knightsbridge and in Hyde Park.
mandarin-oriental-london.descriptionZh: 两个奇妙世界的精彩碰撞。骑士桥区和海德公园交汇地带的经典地标。

mandarin-oriental-paris.description: With a prime location on the Right Bank, Mandarin Oriental, Paris is a tribute to fashion and artistic creativity, infused with the brand's legendary service.
mandarin-oriental-paris.descriptionZh: 巴黎文华东方酒店地理位置优越，坐落于塞纳河右岸，致敬时尚与艺术创意，为您提供品牌的传奇式服务。

mandarin-oriental-milan.description: Ideally located just few steps from the Duomo, Mandarin Oriental, Milan offers a charming mix of Milanese style and design in the fashionable heart of the city.
mandarin-oriental-milan.descriptionZh: 米兰文华东方酒店地理位置优越，距离米兰大教堂仅数步之遥，在城市的时尚中心地带为您呈现米兰风情和设计魅力的巧妙融合。

mandarin-oriental-lucerne.description: An iconic Belle Époque landmark, offering a premier luxury experience with stunning Lakefront views of the Swiss Alps, and unforgettable outdoor adventures.
mandarin-oriental-lucerne.descriptionZh: 酒店是“美好年代”的地标性建筑，坐拥瑞士阿尔卑斯山迷人的湖畔美景，提供尊贵奢华体验以及精彩刺激的户外探险活动。

mandarin-oriental-barcelona.description: An urban oasis located in the heart of Barcelona's Golden Square. Indulge in exceptional gastronomy and unparalleled well-being amidst Gaudí's iconic gems.
mandarin-oriental-barcelona.descriptionZh: An urban oasis located in the heart of Barcelona's Golden Square. Indulge in exceptional gastronomy and unparalleled well-being amidst Gaudí's iconic gems.

mandarin-oriental-munich.description: Nestled in the vibrant heart of Munich, Mandarin Oriental, Munich is the ultimate in elegance. It combines the city's cultural riches, storied past and enduring traditions into an unrivalled experience of luxury.
mandarin-oriental-munich.descriptionZh: Nestled in the vibrant heart of Munich, Mandarin Oriental, Munich is the ultimate in elegance. It combines the city's cultural riches, storied past and enduring traditions into an unrivalled experience of luxury.

mandarin-oriental-new-york.description: Mandarin Oriental, New York is in an idyllic location next to iconic Central Park, world-class dining, shopping and entertainment.
mandarin-oriental-new-york.descriptionZh: 纽约文华东方酒店地理位置得天独厚，靠近标志性的中央公园，更有出众的餐饮、购物和娱乐场所云集于此。

mandarin-oriental-dubai.description: With a pristine seafront setting, Mandarin Oriental Jumeira, Dubai is a stylish urban resort overlooking the clear blue waters of the Arabian Gulf and Dubai’s glittering skyline, dominated by Burj Khalifa. The hotel's beachfront location and al fresco facilities are designed to bring a new level of relaxed luxury to the city.
mandarin-oriental-dubai.descriptionZh: 迪拜朱美拉文华东方酒店是一家时尚前卫的都市度假酒店，坐拥迷人的天然海滨美景。您可俯瞰阿拉伯湾澄澈湛蓝的水域，欣赏以哈利法塔为主的迪拜天际线壮丽景观。优越的海滨地理位置，搭配完善的户外酒店设施，将迪拜这座城市的奢华闲适魅力提升到了新高度。

mandarin-oriental-abu-dhabi.description: Located on a pristine private beach, Emirates Palace Mandarin Oriental is the epitome of luxury in Abu Dhabi.
mandarin-oriental-abu-dhabi.descriptionZh: 酋长宫殿文华东方酒店坐落在纯净的私人海滩，尽显阿布扎比的奢华魅力。

mandarin-oriental-doha.description: Mandarin Oriental, Doha is an intimate and stylish urban retreat located in the centre of Msheireb Downtown Doha, the lifestyle and cultural heart of the city.
mandarin-oriental-doha.descriptionZh: 多哈文华东方酒店地处多哈中央美夏尔城的优越位置，坐拥城市灿烂文化瑰宝和独特生活方式，融舒适惬意与现代时尚于一身，闹中取静，为您打造一方沙漠中的绿洲。

mandarin-oriental-zurich.description: Mandarin Oriental Savoy, Zurich is a Forbes Travel Guide Five-Star destination in the heart of the city, offering gourmet dining and memorable experiences around Lake Zurich and its Old Town.
mandarin-oriental-zurich.descriptionZh: 苏黎世萨沃伊文华东方酒店坐落于城市中心，荣膺《福布斯旅游指南》五星评级，宾客可以在苏黎世湖和老城区周围品尝精致美食，获享难忘体验。

mandarin-oriental-amsterdam.description: Adjacent to some of Amsterdam's cultural hotspots, Mandarin Oriental Conservatorium, Amsterdam began as a bank and soon after a music school. Now the 5-star living room of Amsterdam, and a beloved landmark in the city.
mandarin-oriental-amsterdam.descriptionZh: 阿姆斯特丹音乐学院文华东方酒店毗邻城中多处文化名胜，该建筑最初为一家银行，后又改为一所音乐学院。如今则华丽转型为阿姆斯特丹的豪华起居之地，更是这座城市的热门景点。

mandarin-oriental-istanbul.description: Mandarin Oriental Bosphorus, Istanbul epitomizes luxury, offering an unparalleled sanctuary of opulence and grandeur in an illustrious urban resort.
mandarin-oriental-istanbul.descriptionZh: 伊斯坦布尔博斯普鲁斯海峡文华东方酒店尽显典雅奢华，在知名的城市度假胜地中为您呈现一处富丽堂皇的度假天堂。

mandarin-oriental-london-mayfair.description: Mandarin Oriental Mayfair, London is a sleek, boutique hotel offering a unique taste of urban luxury in the heart of the city. At the crossroads of Art, Fashion and Culture.
mandarin-oriental-london-mayfair.descriptionZh: 伦敦梅菲尔文华东方酒店是一家位于市中心的时尚精品酒店，带您领略别具一格的都市奢华体验。艺术、时尚和文化的魅力交融。

mandarin-oriental-lutetia-paris.description: Where Parisian heritage meets artistic luxury. Bringing Paris together since 1910.
mandarin-oriental-lutetia-paris.descriptionZh: 巴黎传统与艺术奢华在此邂逅。自1910起，融汇巴黎精髓。

mandarin-oriental-cortina.description: Set against the majestic peaks of the Dolomites, Mandarin Oriental Cristallo, Cortina embodies the timeless elegance of Italy's most iconic Alpine destination.
mandarin-oriental-cortina.descriptionZh: Set against the majestic peaks of the Dolomites, Mandarin Oriental Cristallo, Cortina embodies the timeless elegance of Italy's most iconic Alpine destination.

mandarin-oriental-mallorca.description: Set against the stunning backdrop of Puerto Portals, Mandarin Oriental Punta Negra, Mallorca blends the island’s natural beauty with a refined spirit. Mallorca’s vibrant rhythm unfolds through thoughtfully curated experiences, spirited culinary moments and restorative wellness rituals—each inviting guests to savour the island in a way that feels both authentic and deeply engaging.
mandarin-oriental-mallorca.descriptionZh: 马略卡岛蓬塔内格拉文华东方酒店坐拥波塔尔斯港(Puerto Portals)的迷人景观，将优雅韵味与马略卡岛的自然美景巧妙融合。精心策划的体验、充满活力的用餐时光和焕活水疗仪式彰显马略卡岛的跃动韵律，每一种体验都邀请宾客以真实且富有沉浸感的方式，感受这座岛屿的魅力。

mandarin-oriental-beijing-qianmen.description: Located in the heart of a traditional hutong neighbourhood, Mandarin Oriental Qianmen, Beijing is a remarkable, unique property of just 42 courtyard houses.
mandarin-oriental-beijing-qianmen.descriptionZh: 北京前门文华东方酒店位于传统胡同区核心地带，仅设42座庭院式客房，非同凡响，且独树一帜。

mandarin-oriental-landmark-hong-kong.description: In the heart of Central, Mandarin Oriental The Landmark, Hong Kong is a gateway to what’s next. Reimagined by Joyce Wang, its 109 rooms and suites offer an intimate residential base in the city, while seven Michelin stars on the seventh floor affirm its place among Asia’s distinctive culinary destinations for those drawn to taste and creativity.
mandarin-oriental-landmark-hong-kong.descriptionZh: 坐落于中环核心地带的香港置地文华东方酒店是通往未来之境的门户。酒店由设计师Joyce Wang焕新设计，其109间客房及套房为宾客提供了一处位于市中心的温馨居所。七楼共持有七颗米其林星的餐厅，则巩固了酒店作为亚洲独特美食胜地的地位，吸引着那些追求味觉享受与创意体验的食客。

mandarin-oriental-dubai-downtown.description: In the heart of Dubai, Mandarin Oriental Downtown, Dubai embodies luxury city living. An iconic landmark, it brings together contemporary design, refined dining and innovative wellness, curating a destination where wonder unfolds at every level.
mandarin-oriental-dubai-downtown.descriptionZh: 迪拜市中心文华东方酒店坐落于迪拜核心地带，是奢华都市生活的典范。作为地标性建筑，酒店将现代设计、精致餐饮和创新康养理念巧妙融合，打造出处处蕴藏惊喜的理想度假胜地。

cheval-blanc-randheli.description: Discover a paradise in the Maldives with the ocean on your doorstep and enjoy your stay at the fine hotel Cheval Blanc Randheli. Undeniably divine!

cheval-blanc-courchevel.description: Discover the bold spirit of the French Alps in the luxury hotel Cheval Blanc Courchevel: bold design, modern, exquisite and exclusive!

cheval-blanc-paris.description: Paris luxury hotel with Eiffel Tower view – Cheval Blanc Paris, a contemporary sanctuary in the heart of the City of Light

cheval-blanc-seychelles.description: Discover a paradise in the Seychelles with the ocean on your doorstep and enjoy your stay at the fine hotel Cheval Blanc Seychelles.

Today, Aman embraces 33 resorts, hotels, and private residences in 20 countries. Aman continues to seek out transformative experiences and awe-inspiring locations around the world with a further eight coming soon, taking the brand to 41 resorts in 22 countries.

amanruya-bodrum.description: Discover Amanruya, a luxury, village-like and secluded resort with private beach on the Aegean Sea's serene north coast of Bodrum, Turkey. Book with Aman.

rosewood-shanghai.description: Rosewood Shanghai will be situated in the heart of Shanghai’s Jing’An District and Suhewan area, an emerging business and cultural hub.

rosewood-sanya.description: Soaring over Hainan Bay in an exclusive Sanya resort enclave, Rosewood Sanya is one of the finest luxury hotels in China—an island haven embraced by the sea.

bulgari-beijing.description: The Bvlgari Hotel Beijing, as Luxury Hotels in Beijing China, is an intimate oasis where the discerning traveller and the Beijing’s sophisticated elite may encounter nature and art.

bulgari-shanghai.description: Experience timeless glamour at the Bvlgari Hotel Shanghai in a stunning riverside location, just a few minutes from the iconic Bund and Shanghai City Centre. Featuring some of the most extensive facilities in the city, the hotel includes 82 rooms and suites, a 2,000-square-metre Bvlgari SPA, fitness centre, and state-of-the-art meeting facilities. As well, the rooftop Italian restaurant and bar.

niccolo-chengdu.description: Niccolo Hotels is a collection of contemporary chic hotels that are the perfect backdrop to all of life's memorable moments. Choose from our hotels in Hong Kong and in Mainland China to enjoy our best rate guarantee when you book directly with us.

murray-hong-kong.description: Niccolo Hotels is a collection of contemporary chic hotels that are the perfect backdrop to all of life's memorable moments. Choose from our hotels in Hong Kong and in Mainland China to enjoy our best rate guarantee when you book directly with us.

ritz-carlton-beijing.description: Explore Our Collection of Luxury hotels and resorts from The Ritz-Carlton.

six-senses-kyoto.description: Experience Six Senses, a serene urban hotel in the Higashiyama Ward of downtown Kyoto, blending luxury and tranquility for your perfect stay.

ritz-carlton-singapore.description: The Ritz-Carlton, Millenia Singapore is renowned for panoramic views from its spacious guestrooms and suites, together with award-winning hospitality synonymous with The Ritz-Carlton brand. Our luxury hotel Singapore, Marina Bay features a Club Lounge with five daily culinary presentations and all-day champagne. Restaurants include Colony, offering a culinary journey through Singapore's heritage, and the one-Michelin-star Summer Pavilion for authentic Cantonese cuisine. Enjoy an afternoon beneath the skylight of The Ritz Lounge, followed by 1960s-inspired cocktails at the award-winning Republic bar. EPICUTIS® facials and ESPA body treatments are available at The Ritz-Carlton Spa, while octagonal bathroom windows frame stunning skyline views, making it a perfect romantic luxury hotel in Marina Bay Singapore for couples' getaways and indulgent escapes. Kindly note that our hotel does not participate in Marriott Bonvoy.

rosewood-singapore.description: Indulge in the world of luxury with Rosewood, a global collection of hotels & resorts designed for discerning travelers seeking unparalleled elegance.

rosewood-bangkok.description: Discover Rosewood Bangkok, a visually stunning architectural marvel. Our luxury 5-star hotel in Bangkok is a sublime expression of the Thai spirit.

banyan-tree-phuket.description: Experience a premier 5-star award-winning resort at Banyan Tree Phuket, with a luxury all-pool villa resort with beach club, golf, spa and wellbeing activities. Book now!

rosewood-phuket.description: Escape to the Rosewood Phuket, a luxury Phuket resort, where an exquisite seaside setting meets serene tropical surroundings and exceptional amenities.

trisara-phuket.description: A multi-award-winning, family-owned group of luxury hotels and resorts worldwide at inspiring destinations that honour the spirit of place.

rosewood-london.description: Experience an ideal mix of British heritage and contemporary sophistication at Rosewood London, a peerless luxury hotel in London near Covent Garden.

rosewood-hotel-de-crillon.description: An illustrious landmark overlooking place de la Concorde, Hôtel de Crillon is a luxury hotel in Paris that is timeless and unabashedly elegant.

rosewood-new-york.description: Indulge in the world of luxury with Rosewood, a global collection of hotels & resorts designed for discerning travelers seeking unparalleled elegance.

ritz-carlton-chicago.description: The Ritz-Carlton, Chicago, offers an iconic address that unites the city, lake, and sky in a vibrant and luxurious setting on Chicago's Gold Coast. Our hotel legacy lives through generations of families, travelers, and trailblazers, providing a coveted setting to enjoy what matters most. Cherished heritage, community soul, landmark service, and Midwest sincerity are all to be found at this luxury hotel in Chicago. Our beacon of hospitality is the backdrop for new and established voices in connecting, reconnecting and uncovering the dynamic energy of Chicago.

ritz-carlton-boston.description: Perfectly situated in the heart of downtown Boston, The Ritz-Carlton, Boston offers guests an unmatched blend of refinement and comfort. Boston proudly claims the distinguished honor as the inaugural home of The Ritz-Carlton brand in the United States, a legacy that has flourished since its inception in 1927, continually redefining the art of luxurious hospitality. Relax in our hotel suites in downtown Boston. Elevate your senses in our Boston luxury accommodation amidst the panoramic cityscape views from our 193 lavishly appointed rooms and suites. Our contemporary meeting space floor provides a versatile backdrop for meetings, weddings, and special events. Savor decadent cuisine at our hotel's New England-inspired bistro, Artisan Bistro, and enjoy craft cocktails at our sophisticated lobby lounge, Avery Bar.
